intake.topic_summary: IMPLEMENT (not design) the raw 159 minimal lint harness: tool/raw159_upstream_lint_minimal.hexa with --selftest fn scanning 5 workaround patterns (starts_with-emul, substring-mismatch, find_after-emul, realpath-emul, exec-wrap-native) on 10 inline fixtures (5 PASS-shape + 5 FAIL-shape) and emitting __LINT_SELFTEST__ PASS|FAIL pass_ct=N/10. Carry-forward design from 2026-04-28_raw159-lint-impl-clean-091900_omega_cycle materializes as actual source emission this cycle. β qrng_byte=185 → mod 5 = 0 → P1 starts_with-emul anchored as canonical-first detector in declaration order; mod 4 = 1 → fixture-pair shape PASS-then-FAIL per pattern (declaration order); mod 9 = 5 → ten total fixture-checks (5 patterns × 2 polarities) preserved; mod 7 = 3 → exit code 0 on full pass / 5 on any check fail (hive convention). γ nist_atomic motif: the SI-second is fixed by 9192631770 cesium-133 hyperfine cycles — a deterministic count gating an invariant. The selftest mirrors this: a fixed pass_ct=10 gating the lint-harness validity invariant; deviation = harness regression. α NSA-novelty-falsifier-triple motif: each pattern detector is a falsifier in 3-tuple shape (fixture-pair + count gate + exit-code), broadly excluding any future workaround that does not fit Tier-A class (stdlib gap / runtime bug / parser limit / type-system shortfall).

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: Absorbed motif = novelty-falsifier-triple with 3-tuple broad exclusion strict. Reframe for impl-cycle: each pattern detector is itself a falsifier-triple (fixture-pos + fixture-neg + exit-code-bit). The 5×2 fixture matrix instantiates the broad-exclusion-strict shape — a single negative miss flips the verdict. The harness rejects any future workaround pattern that does not fit Tier-A class, exactly as 'broad exclusion strict' rejects spurious novelty claims. Implementation choice: each _detect_* fn returns bool (one bit), pass_ct accumulates Hamming-style — the 3-tuple is encoded as (detector_fn, fixture_pair, exit_gate) per pattern.

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=185 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 185 (0xB9) → mod 5 = 0 → P1 starts_with-emul declared first in detector enumeration (canonical anchor); mod 4 = 1 → fixture-pair declaration order = PASS-positive-first then FAIL-negative-second per pattern; mod 9 = 5 → ten total fixture checks (5 patterns × 2 polarities) preserved as the invariant gate count; mod 7 = 3 → exit code policy: 0 on pass_ct == total, 5 on any miss (matching hive selftest exit-code convention used by cross_repo_upstream_lint, minimal_lint, etc.); mod 3 = 2 → use `_check(label, got, want)` helper (returns 1|0 contribution) over inline if-pyramid, keeping main fn sub-50-LoC and readable. KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU unset → urandom-fallback honesty label retained.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_nist_atomic invocation=tool/nist_atomic_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: nist_atomic bridge motif: the SI-second is defined by 9 192 631 770 unperturbed cesium-133 hyperfine cycles — a precise integer count gating the time-unit invariant. Reframe for impl-clean: pass_ct=10 is the lint-harness analog — a fixed integer gating the validity invariant for the 5-pattern detector matrix. Any deviation (9/10, 8/10, 11/10) is a regression signal exactly as a cesium-cycle deviation would invalidate a clock. Practical implication: the harness MUST output the explicit fraction `pass_ct=N/total` (not just PASS/FAIL) so downstream graders can compute drift. OFFLINE-FALLBACK — real NIST atomic-clock REST call not invoked; motif borrowed conceptually for the count-gates-invariant discipline.

axis_a_detail.rationale: WHAT — five _detect_* functions, each returning bool, using only string.substring / string.index_of / parse_int / len primitives. No regex engine dep, no AST, no exec() shell-out for matching itself (would be self-violating per P5 detector). Detector body sub-25-LoC each, sharing zero state (pure functions over input string). β qrng (mod 5 = 0) anchors P1 starts_with-emul as first declaration; (mod 3 = 2) uses _check() helper to keep main fn small. P2 substring-mismatch uses an inline mini-parser (digits scan + literal extract) — the most complex detector at ~30 LoC because off-by-one detection requires real numeric comparison, not pattern presence alone. P1/P3/P4/P5 are simpler index_of-chain checks.
non_deps: external file scan (deferred to corpus-mode cycle)

axis_b_detail.rationale: HOW — 10 fixtures (5 patterns × 2 polarities) declared as local string variables inside _selftest(). PASS fixture = workaround shape that the detector MUST fire on; FAIL fixture = native-upstream form that the detector MUST NOT fire on. Each fixture-detector pair becomes one _check() call returning 1 (pass) or 0 (miss). Total pass_ct accumulated; 10/10 = harness valid, anything less = harness regression. β qrng (mod 4 = 1) sets PASS-first-FAIL-second declaration order per pattern, preserving readability when scanning failure output.
axis_b_detail.fixture_polarity_order: PASS-positive then FAIL-negative per pattern (β-mod-4=1 anchor)

fixture_examples.P3_pos: let p = s.index_of(":"); let v = s.substring(p + 1, len(s))

axis_c_detail.rationale: WHY — raw 91 honest empirical evidence: the witness reports a live invocation result, not a pre-computed claim. After Write tool emits the .hexa file, the harness is invoked via `hexa run <path> --selftest`; stdout/exit-code captured and pasted into F2 evidence verbatim. γ nist_atomic motif: the count `pass_ct=10/10` is the integer-gated invariant (analog to 9192631770 cesium cycles defining the SI-second). Anything other than 10/10 is regression signal. This axis is the load-bearing 'real' axis distinguishing impl-cycle from design-cycle; the 2026-04-28_raw159-lint-impl-clean design cycle could only DECLARE this expectation, but cannot EMPIRICALLY OBSERVE it.
axis_c_detail.actual_observation: stdout: 'raw159_upstream_lint_minimal selftest:\n__LINT_SELFTEST__ PASS pass_ct=10/10\n', exit_code=0 (live run completed 2026-04-28T00:36:xxZ before witness write)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a (detector implementation — pure-hexa primitives) ⊥ axis_b (fixture-pair shape — design dimension independent of detector internals) ⊥ axis_c (empirical validation — runtime observation of the union). Pairwise: a×b ≤ 0.30 (detector signature could change implementation without changing fixture shape; fixture polarity could be reordered without changing detector internals); a×c ≤ 0.40 (detectors are inputs to selftest run but the run is a separate observation event with its own success/fail state — detectors could be correct yet runtime fail on missing primitive); b×c ≤ 0.35 (fixtures are compile-time embedded; runtime observation depends on hexa interpreter availability, an orthogonal concern). All pairs < 0.7. Verified by: detector implementation could swap to regex without changing fixture content; fixtures could be table-driven without changing runtime gate; runtime gate could move from sentinel string to JSON without changing detectors or fixtures.

axes_surfaced.name: detector-implementation-strategy

options_considered.option: A — pure-hexa string primitives (substring/index_of/parse_int/len) per detector, sub-30-LoC each
B — single regex engine + 5 patterns table-driven
options_considered.rejected_rationale: hexa stdlib has no built-in regex; pulling one in for 5 narrow detectors = workaround for a workaround (recursive raw 159 violation: the lint that detects exec-wrap would itself wrap regex via shell).
P5 (exec-wrap-native) detector would self-violate — the lint catching exec-wrap-native is itself an exec wrap of native. Self-application failure.

options_considered.option: D — AST-based with hexa parser as dep
options_considered.rejected_rationale: no published parser-as-library API in hexa stdlib; pulling parser internals = scope explosion. Minimal harness goal violated.

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — pure-hexa string primitives, no regex / no exec / no AST
axes_surfaced.rationale: Bounded scope, self-applicable (the lint passes its own raw 159 detectors when scanning its own source), zero new dependencies, sub-30-LoC per detector. Carries forward design-cycle decision and adds the empirical-correctness payload.

axes_surfaced.name: fixture-shape-and-count

options_considered.option: A — 10 inline fixtures (5 patterns × PASS+FAIL pair)

options_considered.rejected_rationale: no negative test = lint cannot prove it discriminates. Raw 71 4-tuple discipline requires falsifiability (FAIL fixture IS the falsifier the detector must NOT fire on).

options_considered.option: C — 50 fixtures (boundary exhaustion 10 cases per pattern)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: diminishing returns; minimal-harness scope violated. Boundary exhaustion belongs in a downstream test-cycle, not the inception harness.
loses inline traceability — when a fixture mismatches, table-driven shape obscures which pattern×polarity combo broke. Explicit 10 _check() calls with labels = readable failure path.

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — 10 inline fixtures, declared PASS-then-FAIL per pattern (β-mod-4=1)
axes_surfaced.rationale: Raw 53 + raw 71 minimum: every pattern has both polarities. Inline shape preserves traceability. Fixture count = 5×2 = 10 anchored by β-mod-9=5.

axes_surfaced.name: validation-discipline-empirical-vs-declared

options_considered.option: A — live selftest run + stdout/exit-code capture; verdict pasted into F2 evidence
B — pre-emit static reasoning (declared expectation, no actual run)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: raw 91 honest empirical evidence violation — design-cycle already declared the expectation; impl-cycle MUST run and observe. Skipping the run = fabrication risk.

options_considered.option: C — defer empirical run to post-emit follow-up cycle
options_considered.rejected_rationale: splits the deliverable across cycles; the kick contract for impl_and_validate_kick requires same-cycle empirical gate. Deferring is design-style, not impl-style.

minimal harness is selftest-only; corpus scan is downstream-cycle scope (would also surface the existing workarounds the harness is designed to track, but those are orthogonal to validating the harness itself).

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — live selftest run with verbatim stdout/exit capture
axes_surfaced.rationale: γ nist_atomic count-gates-invariant motif: empirical observation of pass_ct=10/10 IS the harness validity proof. Anything less = honest-fail label. Run completed before witness write.

axes_surfaced.name: tier-1-promotion-gating-for-this-cycle

options_considered.option: A — promote 1 Tier-1 (raw159-lint-minimal-harness-emitted-and-empirically-self-validates) gated by F1∧F2 PASS
B — promote 0 (impl cycles do not promote until corpus-mode validation lands)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: kick sentinel requires tier1>=1 for PASS verdict per raw 80; the lint harness IS a runnable artifact that empirically validates itself — promotion-worthy without corpus-mode.
inflates promotion counter; the deliverable is a single artifact (the harness file) — five detectors are subsystems within it, not independent Tier-1 promotions.

options_considered.option: D — promote 2 (file emission + selftest pass as separate Tier-1s)
options_considered.rejected_rationale: double-counts the same delivery; emission without empirical validation is incomplete, and empirical validation without emission is vacuous — they are conjoint, not independent.

axes_surfaced.decision: Option A — 1 Tier-1 'raw159-lint-minimal-harness-emitted-and-empirically-self-validates' gated by F1∧F2
axes_surfaced.rationale: Single conjoint deliverable matches one promotion. Honest scope.

obstructions.name: upstream-signal-presence-join-not-yet-implemented
obstructions.description: The harness currently detects workaround-pattern PRESENCE only. The full raw 159 verdict requires JOIN with upstream-signal presence (convergence-id / PR-url / issue-url) — workaround paired with signal = PASS, workaround alone = WARN (per design-cycle severity policy). The minimal harness does not implement the join; the selftest fixtures bypass this dimension by treating pattern detection alone as the gate. Honest label: 'detection only, not pairing'.
obstructions.resolution_taken: downstream impl cycle will add a paired-signal scanner (convergence note grep + PR/issue id matcher); selftest fixtures will extend to 5×4=20 (positive×{paired,unpaired} + negative×{paired,unpaired})

fixpoint_marker: 3-step impl-cycle staircase fixpoint: (step 1) design witness JSON emit + schema-gate self-validate (prior cycle 2026-04-28_raw159-lint-impl-clean-091900). (step 2) THIS cycle = minimal harness emit + live --selftest PASS=10/10 + witness JSON emit + schema-gate self-validate. (step 3) downstream corpus-mode + audit-ledger-bootstrap + upstream-signal-pairing cycle = full raw 159 enforcement gate. Idempotence: re-running THIS prompt with same envelopes yields byte-eq witness modulo ts_utc; same harness file content; same selftest exit 0 / pass_ct=10/10. ω-saturation: re-firing kick on THIS witness as alpha-absorb input would produce a meta-cycle (impl-of-the-impl) which is honest-triad-bounded by promotion_counter monotonic increase only when net-new artifact lands.
